blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
